subcodes.first_line: This ring of eminence hath fallen into that noose of tribulation - it was thy tress; every musk-fragrance that reacheth the senses cometh from creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این حلق بها در حلقه فتاد آن طوق بلا موی تو بود هر نفحه مشک کاید بمشام از خلق
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @poems and quotation from poetry
